description: Create search API route that orchestrates the full search pipeline: parse query, hybrid search, rerank, permission filter, return with facets. Add proactive search endpoint.
steps: Create services/search-indexer/src/api/search.router.ts - Search API handler with POST /search endpoint that: 1) Parses NL query via QueryParser, 2) Generates embedding for vector search via BatchEmbedder, 3) Runs HybridSearchEngine across requested scopes, 4) Reranks top-50 with CohereReranker to get top-10, 5) Applies PermissionFilter for requesting user, 6) Builds facets via SearchFacetAggregator, 7) Returns typed response. Define SearchAPIRequest and SearchAPIResponse Zod schemas.

Create services/search-indexer/src/api/search.router.test.ts - Test full pipeline integration (all dependencies mocked): NL query parsed correctly, hybrid search called with correct params, reranker applied, permissions enforced, facets returned

Create services/search-indexer/src/api/proactive.router.ts - Proactive search endpoint POST /search/proactive that takes a context (document type, id, content snippet) and returns related items via ProactiveSearch. Zod schemas for request/response.
Create services/search-indexer/src/api/proactive.router.test.ts - Test that context input returns cross-app related items, test with different context types (email, file, calendar)
Create services/search-indexer/src/api/index.ts - Barrel export for API routes
acceptance_criteria: POST /search endpoint orchestrates full pipeline: parse -> embed -> hybrid search -> rerank -> filter -> facets
POST /search/proactive endpoint returns related items for given context
Natural language query 'emails from John last month' flows through parser and produces correct search params
Permission filter prevents user A from seeing user B private data in results
Reranking applied to top-50 results producing top-10
Response includes facets grouped by type, date, sender
All Zod schemas validate request/response shapes
All test files pass with NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run
verification: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run -- should pass all tests including new API route tests
findings: All 17 API tests pass (8 proactive + 9 search router). Prettier formatting applied via lint-staged pre-commit. NODE_OPTIONS="" required for git commit due to proxy-bootstrap.js husky hook issue. Total search-indexer tests: 58 passing across 10 test files.
